-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier::int DESC LIMIT 1

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade AS geometry FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade WHERE kartleggingstatus = '5' AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;<TRONDHEIM_GEOMETRY>'))

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get highest risk class identifier from quick-clay hazard class table

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons for Trondheim municipality extent and highest risk class

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard polygons

5.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
